content:
Administrative Agency: Rochelle Police Dept Incident #: 200600011585 Report No. 2 Entered: 09/28/2006 09:24 By Officer: 00000208 Detective Terry Inman
Case_Nr:
Wednesday 9/27/06 I (Detective Terry Inman) met with nd his sister Elvira Cisneros regarding this case.
I escorted them both to the interview room where Elvira told me that she came with instead of her parents because they do not speak or understand English. She added that she has their permission to act in their place with regards to Ed.
I told and Elvira that I wanted to placedon 90 days police supervision with 15 hours of public service work. I explained to them how the police supervision works and that also has the right to refuse this option and argue his case in court. told me that he would rather do the police supervision.
I explained towhat I would contact Keith Lamb at the high school and arrange for his community service hours. I also told him that once I had these arrangements made I would notify him as to when and where he needs to be to finish them.
Neither nor his sister had any questions. I escorted them to the front lobby and gave them a copy of the police supervision form.
Detective Terry Inman #208
